mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT v.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName FROM vw_user_auth v JOIN users u ON u.user_code = v.user_code WHERE v.project_code = #{projectCode} AND u.is_lock != 1 ORDER BY u.name

SELECT DISTINCT i.assignee_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND i.assignee_code IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.role_code = 1 AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.role_code = 2 AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName

SELECT DISTINCT i.created_by_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.created_by_code JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE u.is_lock != 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.role_code = 1 AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (v.role_code = 2 AND p.status = 'OD1') ) ) ORDER BY projectCode, userName
